config.euclidean_limit_matching: implementation weight is 4*w for c=0 and w for c>0 because d_H,c converges to 2*Euclidean distance as c approaches zero
config.representation: uniform measure over unoriented (LCA, endpoint, endpoint) path objects

full_path_no_explicit_lca.definition: factor_0 = arithmetic mean of shared-encoder node points along the complete AST path
